INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Five years

OTHER-SKILLS: Leadership

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Medicine
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Five years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PostDoc
OTHER-SKILLS: Leadership
AVAILABILITY: Anytime next month

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Medicine
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Five years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PostDoc
OTHER-SKILLS: Leadership
AVAILABILITY: Anytime next month

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Medicine
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Five years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PostDoc
OTHER-SKILLS: Leadership
AVAILABILITY: Anytime next month

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Medicine
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Five years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PostDoc
OTHER-SKILLS: Leadership
AVAILABILITY: Anytime next month

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Let us start.

You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Medicine
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Five years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PostDoc
OTHER-SKILLS: Leadership
AVAILABILITY: Anytime next month

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Medicine
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Five years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PostDoc
OTHER-SKILLS: Leadership
AVAILABILITY: Anytime next month

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are an applicant in a job interview. Here is a description of your CV:

WHAT: Job Application
BACHELOR: Medicine
INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Five years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: PostDoc
OTHER-SKILLS: Leadership
AVAILABILITY: Anytime next month

The recruiter does not know about it yet. 

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: RECRUITER: Please tell me when you could start working for us.
ANSWER: I can start anytime next month.
RECRUITER: In which area did you graduate?
ANSWER: I graduated in Medicine.
RECRUITER: Do you have additional skills?
ANSWER: Yes, I possess strong leadership skills.
RECRUITER: What is your lastest education degree?
ANSWER: My latest education degree is a PostDoc.
RECRUITER: For how long have you been working in the industry?
ANSWER: I have been working in the industry for five years.
ME: Please answer this question carefully. Does the recruiter know about the years of your industry experience? Answer this question with yes or no and then stop.

WHAT: Job Application

Questions from the recruiter will start with RECRUITER. Please reply in the form: ANSWER: <one sentence>
